summary.title: High-Risk Human Interaction
how: YOLO sampled 8 key frames from robbery.mp4 and detected: person x18, car x8, motorcycle x2
The highest visible person count in a sampled frame was 4.
Close person-to-person spacing appeared 17 time(s), suggesting possible contact or crowding.
Movement remained visually steady across sampled frames.
actions: Preserve the full CCTV clip and detection timeline.
Dispatch security or law enforcement for immediate verification.
Review adjacent cameras around the same timestamp.
Use tracked boxes to describe clothing, direction, and exit path.
